taxon.author: (Olivier, 1789)
taxon.distribution: USA to Brazil, Caribbean, Galapagos. Introduced to Canada, Macaronesia, St. Helena, West Africa, Seychelles, India, China, Korea, Japan, Indonesia, Philippines, Australia, Pacific Is.

referenceObject.reference: Olivier, G. A. (1789). Araignée, Aranea. In: Encyclopédie Méthodique, Histoire Naturelle, Insectes. Tome quatrième. Panckoucke, Paris, pp. 173-240. doi: 10.5962/bhl.title.82248
